title: New! Next Gen Marketing Cloud, Archive and New Licensing Now Generally Available for ISVs
author: Matthew Parin

classification.rationale: Rule-based: learning intent detected in 'Introduction'. Products: agentforce, sales_cloud, marketing_cloud, data_cloud. Funnel: consideration.

existing_cta_score.rationale: CTA targets consideration-stage readers; section is consideration-stage. Product alignment: match.

section_analyses.no_cta_reason: Introduction — let the reader engage with the content before presenting a CTA.

cta_health_issues: No CTA at the end of the article. Readers who finish are your highest-intent audience.
Hard commercial CTA at the top of a thought leadership article. Use a softer CTA (newsletter, related content) or move it later.
Multiple CTAs crowding the top of the article.
CTAs in 100% of sections. This is CTA spam — research shows it reduces engagement 15-20%.
